name: Pernelle Cuvée Genesis
description: This premium Australian de-alcoholised sparkling brings together precision winemaking and modern innovation to create a refined, authentically dry style. Crafted from Chardonnay, Pinot Noir and Pinot Meunier, it offers depth, elegance and complexity rarely seen in alcohol-removed sparkling wines. A portion of the base wine is traditionally crafted and aged on lees for a minimum of three years, contributing subtle texture, structure and layered character. The result is a sophisticated brut-style sparkling with crisp freshness, gentle brioche notes and a fine mousse, balanced by only 22g/L of sugar and less than 0.5% ABV. Developed over three years and refined through multiple iterations, Cuvée Genesis represents Pernelle’s Méthode Moderne approach – combining traditional sparkling winemaking principles with innovative alcohol-removal techniques. The wine is gently de-alcoholised in a single pass before undergoing further refinement to preserve its balance, complexity and vibrant character. This elegant sparkling is made for celebratory moments and elevated occasions, offering a polished alcohol-free option that still feels special in the glass Expert Opinion“Pernelle Cuvée Genesis is compelling for wine drinkers thanks to its subtle toasty aroma and refined structure, while remaining simply delicious for anyone looking for a great sparkling drink.”— Ned Goodwin, Master of Wine

name: Vinada Sparkling Chardonnay
description: Meet our lovely Premium and IWSC 1st prize awarded French Chardonnay as well as "The World's Best Vegan Alcohol Free wine by World Alcohol Free Awards! Our Vegan alcohol free beauty brings you an impressive balanced flavour - crisp, fresh and boasts of aroma from apple, melon and a bit of citrus on the palate. This sparkling wine tastes great, as the bubbles titillate and refresh your senses. With its origin in the French wine-growing region Languedoc, this non alcoholic wine is made from a unique mixture of Chardonnay grapes. A low calorie drink yet full of style and attitude to celebrate life achievements and all fun reasons to raise a glass with bubbles. Celebrate and take care of yourself. We wouldn’t want it any other way More about Languedoc wine Region The Languedoc wine region is located in the south of France and borders the Mediterranean Sea and is characterized by a hilly landscape. It has a Mediterranean climate, with plenty of sun and wind from the sea. Our vineyard in Languedoc is located in the coastal area. Wind from the Mediterranean allows the aromas of the grapes to develop well and they are cooled by the wind. Clay, slate and sandstone are the soil types that can be found here. In short, the ideal conditions for our Award winning Chardonnay to grow into a famulous wine with a lot of Characteristics. VINADA® Crispy Chardonnay (0%) 750 ml is certified Vegan by The Vegan Society. The Vegan trademark has been helping users to identify that our products are free from animal ingredients. Especially in the wine filtration process we use an animal-friendly alternative. In Short it is "WONDERFUL DRY AND FULL OF ATTITUDE. CRISPY IT IS"

name: Senorio de la Tautila Blanco
description: Señorío de la Tautila white wine is crafted from Airén grapes, carefully dealcoholised just before bottling to preserve its natural aromas and structure while removing the alcohol and calories. This citrus-scented white offers a fresh and lively experience, making it a versatile companion for a variety of dishes.Tasting Notes:Visual: Straw yellow.Aroma: Bright, fragrant, and citrus-forward.Palate: Fresh, aromatic, and lively with a pleasant bitter finish.Dealcoholisation Method:Produced through vacuum distillation at low temperature, a traditional and gentle method that maintains the wine’s character and integrity without aggressive processing. Experience the traditional taste of white wine, now in a refreshing, alcohol-free form.

name: Ms Sans Make Me A Sanstini Vodka Substitute
description: The Ms Sans Make Me A Sanstini is an alcohol-free alternative to Vodka. It features a velvety smooth, warming mouthfeel and can be enjoyed on its own with a twist of lemon in a martini glass or added to your favourite mixer. It also perfectly replaces vodka in cocktails including the Moscow Mule, Screwdriver or Cosmopolitan. Visit or mocktail section for recipes. The Ms Sans Make Me A Sanstini is low in sugar (with no added sugar or artificial sweeteners), low in calories and vegan friendly. Vodka SubstituteAustralian MadeVeganLow Calorie

name: Ms Sans Butterfly Pea Blush | Color-Changing Non-Alcoholic Gin
description: The Ms Sans Call Me Indigo is a non-alcoholic gin alternative naturally made with the Butterfly Pea flower which lends this delicious drink with a beautiful ink hue. One of the most unique features of the natural Butterfly Pea colour is that it changes shade from ink to indigo when citrus is added. This one of a kind alcohol-free spirit boasts flavours of classic juniper and floral botanicals making it the perfect base for a G&T with a twist. Add 30mls over ice and top with tonic or soda water and a slice of lemon. The Ms Sans Call Me Indigo is low in sugar (with no added sugar or artificial sweeteners), low in calories and vegan friendly. Naturally coloured Changes colour from ink to indigoVeganSugar Free

name: Clausthaler Original Non Alcoholic Beer Can
description: Clausthaler is one of the pioneers in non-alcoholic brewing, known for producing consistently reliable alcohol-free beers. This original blonde style offers a clear golden colour, a fresh aroma and a smooth, balanced taste with light bitterness and a clean finish. Brewed using traditional German methods, it delivers a classic lager-style experience without the alcohol. Low in fat and moderate in calories, it’s a well-rounded option for those looking for a lighter, easy-drinking beer that can be enjoyed at any time.

name: Dalman Street Non-Alcoholic Aussie Lager 375ml
description: Dalman Street beers come from The Coastal Brewing Company in Forster, NSW, known for craft-driven brews with under 0.5% ABV that still feel like real beer. The Non-Alcoholic Lager offers a classic Australian lager experience with a crystal-clear golden pour, bready malt character, subtle earthy hop notes and a clean, crisp finish. Brewed with 100% natural ingredients and advanced membrane filtration, it delivers refreshing flavour without the alcohol. Light on bitterness but rich in familiar taste, this lager is approachable for everyday drinking.

name: Naked Life Canadian Rye Spirit Dry & Lime Non-alcoholic Cocktail
description: Naked Life Non-Alcoholic Cocktail Canadian Rye Spirit, Dry & Lime This non-alcoholic take on a classic rye-style cocktail brings together depth, freshness, and balance in a way that feels familiar yet refined. Built around a rich American oak profile, it carries subtle sweetness and gentle spice, lifted by a crisp dry finish and a hint of lime. Each sip delivers a smooth, lightly sparkling experience that is easy to enjoy, whether you are unwinding at home or serving guests. The flavour profile leans into warm, woody notes with a refreshing citrus edge, making it a versatile choice for any occasion. Made in Australia using at least 95% local ingredients, this drink keeps things simple and clean. It is completely alcohol free, sugar free, and low in calories, so you can enjoy the complexity of a spirit-style cocktail without compromise. Why You’ll Love It • Non-alcoholic alternative to a rye-style cocktail• Smooth oak character with subtle spice and citrus freshness• Sugar free and only 8 calories per can• Lightly sparkling and refreshing• Australian made using high-quality local ingredients Flavour Profile Aroma: Light oak, soft spice, and a hint of citrusPalate: Smooth and dry with gentle sweetness, balanced by limeFinish: Clean, crisp, and refreshing with a subtle woody note When to Enjoy Perfect for relaxed evenings, social gatherings, or when you want something lighter that still feels like a proper drink. It pairs well with savoury snacks, grilled dishes, or can be enjoyed on its own straight from the can. Key Features • Alcohol free• Sugar free• Low calorie (8 calories per can)• Made in Australia
